transcript:
CALLER: Hi. I'm a senior citizen and I have PM-JAY — Ayushman Bharat. Kya yeh chalega aapke yahan?
AGENT: Haan ji! Hum Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY empanelled hain. Eligible treatments ke liye aap cashless facility le sakte hain.
CALLER: Kaunse treatments cover hote hain iske under?
AGENT: PM-JAY mein 1,500 se zyaada treatments covered hain — surgeries, hospitalisation, cancer care, kidney treatment aur bahut kuch. OPD generally cover nahi hoti lekin IPD hoti hai.
CALLER: Mujhe cataract surgery karwani hai. Yeh cover hogi?
AGENT: Ji haan, cataract surgery PM-JAY package mein covered hai. Apna Ayushman card aur Aadhaar lekar aiye, hum verification karenge aur cashless process start karenge.
CALLER: Bahut dhanyawaad beta. Bahut helpful ho aap.
